function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Could you resend the invoice?"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Absolutely — I’ve attached the invoice issued on 2026-03-23 for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox message by preparing a draft reply to Claudia Reiter with the requested 2026-03-23 Helios invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, resolved recipient via canonical primary_contact_email, used sending-email schema for durable outbox record, and deleted the inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked to resend the 2026-03-23 Helios invoice. Sender `claudia@helios-tax.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Requested invoice exists at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md. Created outbound draft in 60_outbox/outbox using runtime timestamp and exact attachment path, then deleted processed inbox file per workflow.
